children.text: Structured information for reference and alignment

children.name: text-1
children.text: A clear framework before moving into more detailed explanations, data, or analysis

children.name: text-2
children.text: This slide provides background information to help the audience understand the broader situation or environment. It establishes context without drawing conclusions, allowing subsequent slides to introduce more specific details.

children.name: text-2
children.text: The content here is designed to orient the reader, clarify scope, and ensure a shared understanding before moving into deeper discussion or analysis.

children.name: text-2
children.text:
This slide outlines a specific issue or challenge relevant to the topic being discussed. The
information is presented factually to ensure clarity and shared understanding before introducing potential insights or responses.

children.name: text-2
children.text: This slide highlights an important observation derived from the information presented. The insight is stated clearly and concisely to support understanding and inform subsequent discussion.

children.name: text-2
children.text: This slide defines the intended focus or outcome for the content that follows.
